chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 824 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.5685/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.3650/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA No.3651/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case. 26.08.2025 Mr. Tahir Nawaz, Advocate for the Petitioners >>>>>..<<<<< Through this Petition, the Petitioners claim their appointment in Education and Literacy Department for the posts of PTI, D.T, O.T and A.T for the process, which was advertised in the year 2012. He; however insists that the Petitioners moved certain applications before the Department, which were not decided by the Secretary, Education, hence maintained this Petition after about 13 years. It is settled principle of law that law always support the vigilant and not the indolent and the Petitioners seemingly have bypassed the legal procedure, thus have not come before this Court with clean hands. In view of the above position, the petition is hit by doctrine of laches, hence is hereby dismissed in limine along with pending applications with no order as to costs. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
